title: Dutch Flaky Tart
description: A sweet and flaky pastry filled with a spicy filling, perfect for dessert or a snack.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry dough and place it in a tart pan.
Mix the spicy filling and tart filling together in a bowl.
Pour the filling into the tart shell.
Dot the top of the tart with butter.
Bake the tart for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
Remove the tart from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Serve the tart warm, dust with sugar if desired.
